summary: TWO_COLUMN: argument principle for f(z)=z(z-1)(z+1). LEFT ComplexPlane with RED zeros at -1, 0, 1 and YELLOW input circle of radius r. RIGHT ComplexPlane shows f(γ) image curve. ValueTracker r_tr tours r=0.5, 1.3, 2.0, 0.5, 1.8. always_redraw both contours. Live Z (zeros inside) and winding count derived from np.angle + diff wrap — always match.
